name: Team Ryan
subject: Last call for conservatives:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

The Democrats are energized. **They 're raising more than we are and using that momentum as their mandate to block your conservative agenda.**

We need to hurry -- we need a surge of conservative support by 11:59pm tonight to show the Democrats that the majority of Americans are with us -- _not them_.

**We need you now, Friend. Will you be part of the conservative groundswell?**
****[**
Pitch in $50 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzA4MzAyNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MDAxNjQ4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Pitch in $25 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzA4MzAyNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MDAxNjQ4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

[**Pitch in $10 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzA4MzAyNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MDAxNjQ4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Pitch in $5 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzA4MzAyNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MDAxNjQ4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**Don 't forget about Speaker Ryan's offer to double match your impact if you pitch in before midnight tonight.**

Thank you,

Team Ryan
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MzA4MzAyNzIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MDAxNjQ4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Friend, can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Hate to bother you on a weekend, but I promise I’ll make this really quick. We have less than 24 hours to meet our fundraising goal, and I’m......
Friend,

Hate to bother you on a weekend, but I promise I’ll make this really quick.

We have less than 10 hours to meet our fundraising goal, and I’m counting on you to get us through!

**Only $6,312 to go to meet our end of quarter goal!**

[**If every person who gets this email chips in just $5, we’ll get there by midnight.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25gr6R05R6iI18bv-rFBXFkf1cnpV7b_xK-qV8uOlK3xkwyxTCh2LzVErgqvaiA6vxXyJ8sLi5UhfAqKEkSkUH7Sn7E8IEWkDxrrUUjUwZ8O2xEmJQAN3--wQ9tB3tIP7TZmulGrJEb-ITeFlScpsBntjD_7-u6qnE5DKa7jhPDe3xPZX5sqlBSw0Wf3eEICw4-Hnf9ZkafJfa8Y-H-ff_vnao-Ipog5DOkRNXe_1o7qsbSWi30eNY8lqBtNjVFcyErYoX0vMLPcK7UuOvyte-2NIi4M_xlwsVx-DISJwa_8x7hLZarXZVpeTyVYZX_AmlITUjM4wXGQsVVtKz7dtvlRwJ3XckqYjLzzNpJE0vaf8im-K5LoAC2CoU-d3u9EGsVQ%3D)
[CHIP IN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByfj9D6hzvMvkJTo9UuASevJ3gxmIV_afEJ4a7k6ehv3Nw9ariviImNdDiDH1bJIaOhdznItCHj75TIq50WuzjCjYU9yKArtLiSLn9O_jFMqimPhve2f7M4Qx37xjxiStUMzsvBS9vsfrP-OcMWZUUY2iWGh7NMf3KVYwObbd77j85R5phToeeQJKiPR6z2dyb2E6-v9jPLpdkPNLXAyuPluc_JCRUta3Ok4Rxehn0epXc%3D)
---

I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to be able to send a bold, strong message to the supporters of Washington dysfunction: we’re coming for you.

Let’s show Washington the Wisconsin Way by making this a successful end to the quarter and [**continuing strong into the rest of the year.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByf2feZelUNkh1_hBhnHJMffDlS2NR57Tbw_3s_YMKTZL7daSV7xRDvArCr946ZLOMxeLZhN93xa_LtAtEF6o66MYqqWsqNEAXuGjnFYb0K-2tBMwDVRV0aA-cBPccdvoO2EYAyehi4CiGUV7fBCdQ3SI2NLy3RfRnQrSG5Rj3FD-5Vh-vFeUVM8ux1rn492IP0Bqbv7f8bxzr3EsYRvZrVPfSwtgxQJuAVV3UAIBkO84c%3D)

Have a great rest of your weekend.

Leah

\----- Forwarded Message -----

To: Friend <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByfYtxgifLYlZHZP0tDJRlG2hToVTwbisU7sh4d5j2uc1u1n3JMPAMJuarfkO2wPzi2wmAfUp335h5JZBRcqs31RdGRreht1x26wx6vMkooOy1ekIWQp8uxsDWCwKnrhQfg7UUqq9a1aQGakQk-6M06ay9CR6Amt6HIYSz1R7mV6h4bkI04wfzwMhwi359QkqCQARTsJctS9cU7fc0Qkwbk3194Q0jpB5jB5TvqA47LmD8%3D)>
From: Leah <[leah@leahvukmir.com](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByfcAUlWxYbL3AxajrgS5GblckpzzugnAbNwJcVWrH0r4_sMtAgJx7-x-mFtcDcX_kEduNTiUBJptdIZ_zmuIPYn80OQ_JAv72Au10vDJcXBcnivRdYMtJsqb9G2rJEEKnB73hfZr_adyjDLem4R4Oq_0FQEUh9ZcjgieHYPt1H5bzKj4S3CRX2FWllpM5TcTfFnsEzTzRklKp3_aj4yff5z-jCZGV7n4TNNdWYZTA_SdA%3D)>

Friend, we’re a day away from the biggest test of our campaign to date.

It’s our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since declaring my race for the U.S. Senate.

As you can imagine -- these FEC deadlines -- they’re an establishment favorite. They scour every line, with the media, determining which candidates have the fitness to continue running for office. It’s how they choose winners and losers in politics.

If we don’t meet our fundraising goals this quarter, you can bet a room full of Washington elites will sigh comfortably in relief.

If our numbers are big? Well, the establishment will be _very_ uneasy.

**And Friend, I’m not running for Senate in Wisconsin to make the establishment feel comfortable.****** With only $11,623 left to meet our goals this quarter, [**I’m hoping you’ll chip in and help show Washington a little bit of the Wisconsin Way.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByfqA36FOeiQX1A8OZBPxWTTsjA6mh75jhOttH4F4tv87yU2NBeslrZhz15x4sz08hrblxchlk2pMZRVWuudn9p2q2wdkq2z8F2kQDkXAG7_SZZshq5Iq0GYsv_LvGgX7Ygy0xLzW4FUE098kdYc_G9RukGHUSCS8TD2HwmKNzJJbKhWGYGtfiuyvhro4DeMOSRvxUm7UZ1BlAzgUBAp-_rkGN87ipHA2l5Vq2NiHTXTbE%3D)
[CHIP IN $5](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25gr6R05R6iI18bv-rFBXFkf1cnpV7b_xK-qV8uOlK3xkwyxTCh2LzVErgqvaiA6vxXyJ8sLi5UhfAqKEkSkUH7Sn7E8IEWkDxrrUUjUwZ8O2xEmJQAN3--wQ9tB3tIP7TZmulGrJEb-ITeFlScpsBntjeeQP_JfGrOnAjw-MkqMhNT3cHMytU936Kpvocq0zP8PWVbTyN_4hwOEKfchKrEQhYyKwdo3bw12QJUQb4klSHKMUAyFMBDga7OzDgAD_dgK23eLGkwwZuphIv71qRBswq8K6aC15mICrMiZaun5dc2SQKgk7F0xzgSZhbyumwy0jpKcsNrQ1vqaGD5i54lin9Zm5S4KnpRnDTpY2ZTW94GfIZcy9LA2VHnEoHXlhaQw%3D)

[CHIP IN $25](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25gr6R05R6iI18bv-rFBXFkf1mxUlj-fLjt2nU7C1L3dLxdyWHtff4CivhjyEZKxqxCHly3sfpAfg9bn92nSkjQCMZHCOyNS-Q7-CN0DDhYRFgOt5UPxrVVLMILn1Tb8v5dJwXXwZi0R80rjNyvFmmYxKHlIg5aVGjVvvVQm81EpvVWi8aNz66HIDs3QVn9lLFg04pu_Zmqr2rW0Lf4VUUWA-f4boLA_cxBF4p2ZBMyzGX05dSd8fwOVIyN5VEgVePz1_cFUi5eCqTlAXLKx4vfMgbiENA4vvz9nhofOXmMP6wupQ-SN3Eqr4w-HNZtcFLxhxOk-BiJ18p23gclR0e9FlvrBzdq98yUrl-ublApXvwgcqzhp8DiAPjaOT5SJwDl2_o6K8JlknlAYAIBtCRwbL)

---
Friend, I’m running for YOU because I believe Wisconsin deserves better than what we’ve been getting. We deserve senators who actually do what they say they’re going to do when they get to Washington. We can’t afford to elect any more politicians who don’t deliver on their promises.

We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change and proven leaders who will get results.

Let’s tell them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation they’ve set for this quarter.

**[If you can chip in today, even just $5, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC2YyghZcyJu6xz6fshW25grhLIihN9z3k9yR2HfuYf7zVia_hmSpcXxitosnHoFDV9jEGnk-6qs-19R6nTIpUqNomS3WUBKKoxlmMRzSXs6trUw0e0kw_SeFTsxjwjrZvo9NoFRrvTxqbEuf_a6JiWMSNjI5-FFHfu0qvihSzByfzWCd67kGDXggvHaH9XeZxnkoothSRDY3Gn0QQGnF1t7LCDUtl391GPA-Hew8JMduYvu94wD-IpGH78-X2we2v8Qgh_EkaZN7krkmu_mczvZ9PjnpCcCKh0nytOg-PsieiDjDWXOB1UJndbzDHOn4uFDe02VBTWbPLRbw07HR9Y2rPOip2ECXkZNef30dQIyoBLc8F2RcKSwscE2gfw5pszxjTMxHmZ1No_B5GPkBBxo%3D) **

Thanks, Friend.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jCwLXx7SgTOLJV8-uNeVUjfTiT5hM625iE2K7LZYxDpgDot8tDzTppXA9og01P9yhL4AWgVuP7zNttFae2H-qPbaVcR2IIiN2d7bNJX3-a3zNq-1YHAKVOcLfmjwTzh1BGIBy2nnSqVPwxM9YDSh7Cu57eoOVgt9uQGOLwygu3NhfrdvNp_bBrJAGqRlFl9U11ouh-JyWJ2yRVHfZ2uVgDsgy7H7E__9FBDyTh0IRDEkUMrsLo3J_IH-BnrMVKliDeQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC0-dn6MzShzQKgxRUOSpi41R2WnkOmlDeMGJLLJWPrhVM6fDEid-Sox5CjTuMGowdnDiSjGhlz9cToev95J-SXTkGc0jvvPG7B4I7jK2p5ya1G16G4JYyR3bLc4CJwXO9SIAMjMtY8nlvhEXoI18tAJV5ZSO3nyCDFASNGrWQxlsu3WLdakiIGHhKugrwXVvi6Mvy0z7cN7q3O55k_QRq-4p6rOameV8HggOKCmbAg_-Am5lhgyLFlF06FcUhlnbKw%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=5nGapksdBbxidKa_xSsgjPGI2KT94geZ3cb_mXmZsDq8X583uRlALSmurHainITLdTEZpiRsQ17RMpcBO-ZGtcLDL8K37F5Ri9gxwYN2lTlepoQ-nAowGimm62CPs3luconU7KLnLvSMVEPtl94etcmdsmZ4lVAE36sZPJuKj_Z5xnHpMmkFIhmWpZAJaG_TLQ_5IkeKYOE89g_z_1oeC4XXoKzsMTBkLEfKeAyDzzF98kJ14JrntGCQQN1u0rW8). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC0oJSgXCXOu1nL4K3A2ED9LJf3yFh2-okZ2h2B9qGrvSbSYylsW8Sz0_FXSJSFwl34EKsbCUKCR4IY-XvJfcqvJ9hWhs-vrcvXmS9kM_JJAFqYcUJye_6TOQdymtXjSvEBV_mAtLPkaA9mcyk5Uls6jO4p4QAr9FRJ8uuDi1Hk1BHNPabaTE8StHzCzJZdsnZ8albgP2_5WadGXFfrhRx6rGz1RNdDUxbDCd9RXNOwf9VuoNe4DXF8dHrm86pLvyEswCeuPiz_YX6_salfD3orvCtM_b45y7WqD5q5ZMkZ7y_iNxvAW3ks8SHQ-DD8gp50ZCmPhg_lCHmCel2lxZnS6GcaL00-hk31-MyU1l1fG0) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC0oJSgXCXOu1nL4K3A2ED9Imlgeqzl3XsmCpgsQ6x5O8zPvSMY6ysaJM3JIgLuf8pS2Bm5kN3IUZJ-NiQ3MF7ZXbSubLAnyCf212UcwUC8Lt9SQjn4skdTrFn4EsCT1i-pcZ3lTzdTnnhInLpyRVEna0vjpzYjMIFw1jd3uDgFtHkanowy0igoMA24C7gP0cl0vGKp-YtAUj5WePzSQS6L2qO3Q-Py9hZfkgbbvQz1fy1_4Rx8lhEgCFWIyQL-WQFx96zeyHyaZInV2BRz3WkcVKEGGCgqJBFYmWnAAhlhkcwwVj9X5kSAzyXdlLodtvogAicgy-YjPDkaHoNOERmfCrZjOeooQTxdzbwi3X54oF) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jCwLXx7SgTOLJV8-uNeVUjfTiT5hM625iE2K7LZYxDpgDY7N1Mv50n62kIIZuZJ1rPZes3A8K_UO0bHaQ3-yUTtTeFQcKXyRH5EeK8zU62xzV9RDyF0g4JR8tikJvZWvx1M7rjJiuWXaGy7LbLW4yU9liMHgewNx6JzcUPV8WGKPirVcBbww2xOkV91lh6qATpqmJZ65uv6ouT4kM_nfGWS_a2wvlRCf8bUQQzzkj8q0p2VJ3BjRArw6kyW6cNFqHNw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC0-dn6MzShzQKgxRUOSpi41R2WnkOmlDeMGJLLJWPrhVfx0BCuTTxJhOGPdaQO0de6bIUm0jTbhX1Vai9F7xfwolWEymR7usvae8AC26Kq6DUBJ475vck-55GP_8it3XGFA3VwAW449YEZn49dbs44D894dWeofGy9DPvtsezo3Tb24yzaAQ1G3Eiphs3eOFA--F8cfwUBtch5ae6BBQhvLSdM8b7n6fyQ0WggEDcXd1hyjBFo4TALo3RYotfsJWkA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC3kLv0ULo_7WC26VMUGbJRFZVG8m_FBLVcdy0d3d5Uvh1ZS7ihQ8gqoXxWbRG0OzPzTY3MedRtoBMewiVN7l2iqQqkzB-w5nqm5CW1Zfx1yyF5ZhsNBGqsr0DF0OfiapZpetO_UqiXv_VQ67H5UdqcRUuarl_1S5vEVPuiFg-PqCzZzYjLAGpm0KHz6EJ2GRs2YMw6MqddIAY2q3Xv0uzNcl_kkta3JhMsu-ccVxNmPswI363aCXXoWo1-6EXSRN-g%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=YZE-5U_dbD1luSim7r6jC0oJSgXCXOu1nL4K3A2ED9KfVPGp9TFxu-LGq2uFBl30FhIL15hy7_ggQipJvcY8diRkrP6HzMxZxQ0reujnBgmlqs5p5E4Dn9NVtsn0KhejdEt7MaCuFuMUNoZ-us2505IrngOV9MVMBXS6gN5UKAonpE7usRC3koCZCx6JOWpCLGqL7Y_6iIe28Rtay6edweM4zbrQHuijPZ79o_FeN5DWywMczGi0Vk1Pw9HdgXErbakzzOg7fXBLBFhWa6bkoOCVomd8e0bpJAB7P6AX0Z1BUrbWt9SdOuPaZxxVNF8r84CeL1q7JNf0OK0YaxMvmE7yE0BTEJt3Suqe-FSggD3gj6PJ2ASZFRv9826b5fNICGqTP28fjUPjB-UvdmDXKQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=5nGapksdBbxidKa_xSsgjPGI2KT94geZ3cb_mXmZsDq8X583uRlALSmurHainITLdTEZpiRsQ17RMpcBO-ZGtcLDL8K37F5Ri9gxwYN2lTlepoQ-nAowGimm62CPs3luconU7KLnLvSMVEPtl94etcmdsmZ4lVAE36sZPJuKj_Z5xnHpMmkFIhmWpZAJaG_TLQ_5IkeKYOE89g_z_1oeC4XXoKzsMTBkLEfKeAyDzzF98kJ14JrntGCQQN1u0rW8) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e9df039c7fa64a15a3b070f41278fff6&_e=5nGapksdBbxidKa_xSsgjPGI2KT94geZ3cb_mXmZsDq8X583uRlALSmurHainITLdTEZpiRsQ17RMpcBO-ZGtcLDL8K37F5Ri9gxwYN2lTlepoQ-nAowGimm62CPs3luconU7KLnLvSMVEPtl94etcmdsmZ4lVAE36sZPJuKj_Z5xnHpMmkFIhmWpZAJaG_TLQ_5IkeKYOE89g_z_1oeC4XXoKzsMTBkLEfKeAyDzzF98kJ14JrntGCQQN1u0rW8) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Hate to bother you on a weekend, but I promise I’ll make this really quick. We have less than 24 hours to meet our fundraising goal, and I’m...... Friend, Hate to bother you on a weekend, but I promise I’ll make this really quick. We have less than 10 hours to meet our fundraising goal, and I’m counting on you to get us through! Only $6,312 to go to meet our end of quarter goal! I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me to be able to send a bold, strong message to the supporters of Washington dysfunction: we’re coming for you. Let’s show Washington the Wisconsin Way by making this a successful end to the quarter and Have a great rest of your weekend. Leah \----- Forwarded Message ----- To: Friend <> From: Leah <> Friend, we’re a day away from the biggest test of our campaign to date. It’s our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since declaring my race for the U.S. Senate. As you can imagine -- these FEC deadlines -- they’re an establishment favorite. They scour every line, with the media, determining which candidates have the fitness to continue running for office. It’s how they choose winners and losers in politics. If we don’t meet our fundraising goals this quarter, you can bet a room full of Washington elites will sigh comfortably in relief. If our numbers are big? Well, the establishment will be very uneasy. And Friend, I’m not running for Senate in Wisconsin to make the establishment feel comfortable.** With only $11,623 left to meet our goals this quarter, Friend, I’m running for YOU because I believe Wisconsin deserves better than what we’ve been getting. We deserve senators who actually do what they say they’re going to do when they get to Washington. We can’t afford to elect any more politicians who don’t deliver on their promises. We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change and proven leaders who will get results. Let’s tell them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation they’ve set for this quarter. ** Thanks, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: TRIPLE MATCH ALERT (via DSCC)
subject: 🚨 QUADRUPLE your impact 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
All gifts before midnight will be TRIPLE-MATCHED -- but time is running out to hit our CRITICAL goal before the End-of-Quarter FEC deadline.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

**_***HURRY, HURRY: ALL GIFTS TRIPLE-MATCHED UNTIL MIDNIGHT_
[Pitch in to support Senate Democrats before the FEC deadline >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are FURIOUS that their plan to repeal health care failed, AGAIN.

**That 's why they are coming after Senate Democrats in a big way.** They know just how damaging it would be if we lost even a SINGLE seat in our Senate firewall.

We need to make sure ALL of our Democratic champions stay in the Senate -- and that starts with hitting our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal BEFORE MIDNIGHT.

**We have just $29,033 to raise before midnight. Team, can you rush a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift to get us on track before it 's too late? **

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=1&refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=5&refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=15&refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=25&refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?amount=35&refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Hitting this goal will send a powerful message to the GOP -- and show the world that grassroots Democrats will have the backs of Senate Democrats in the fights ahead. [**So please, pitch in before midnight (Your gift will go 4X as far!) >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for stepping up,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de00/2b07114c/ebc6ffea/7315c656/1402933474/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de00/2b07114c/ebc6ffea/7315c651/1402933474/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de00/2b07114c/ebc6ffea/7315c650/1402933474/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Tracy Newman, JayInslee.com
subject: (!) FWD: I believe in science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We have just hours until we hit our climate deadline tonight!

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Did you see Governor Inslee's message? This deadline is critical -- we can't wait any longer. Here's the bottom line: Disasters won't stop, the climate crisis won't solve itself, the Earth won't get better -- unless we take action. And Governor Inslee is leading the movement for climate action. **Today, we have just hours left until we hit our September deadline at midnight tonight, and we 're still dangerously short of our goal.** [**Will you donate $5 to help us take climate action NOW?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) We must accelerate the building of this movement. We must take further action today. To do it, Governor Inslee needs your help now. Thanks, Tracy Newman
Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Friday, Sept 29, 2017
Subject: I believe in science
Friend,
Scientists have been warning us about this for decades.
The calls for action -- globally and locally -- are growing louder and louder.
And now, we're seeing the horrific impact that climate change is having on our world and our people. If we fail to act it will only get worse.
**I 'm going to do everything in my power to fight climate change. Because I believe in science and I believe in protecting planet Earth and preserving it for our children. But we have to act now if we're going to hit our goal of raising $10,000 for climate action.**
[**Will you chip in $5 to help us hit our climate goal before midnight tomorrow?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This is not a fight we can lose. This isn't about partisanship, or rhetoric, or politics. This is about saving lives. It's about working towards a thriving planet and a thriving economy.
I hope you'll help us now as we lead the charge.
[**Donate $5 today to take climate action!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTIwMzc5MjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=12037928&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTI2MDAyMzA1NwS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---

PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://www.jayinslee.com/privacy)

Here's the bottom line: Disasters won't stop, the climate crisis won't solve itself, the Earth won't get better -- unless we take action. And Governor Inslee is leading the movement for climate action. Today, we have just hours left until we hit our September deadline at midnight tonight, and we 're still dangerously short of our goal. We must accelerate the building of this movement. We must take further action today. To do it, Governor Inslee needs your help now. Thanks, Tracy Newman Team Inslee | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Jay Inslee Date: Friday, Sept 29, 2017 Subject: I believe in science Friend, Scientists have been warning us about this for decades. The calls for action -- globally and locally -- are growing louder and louder. And now, we're seeing the horrific impact that climate change is having on our world and our people. If we fail to act it will only get worse. I 'm going to do everything in my power to fight climate change. Because I believe in science and I believe in protecting planet Earth and preserving it for our children. But we have to act now if we're going to hit our goal of raising $10,000 for climate action. This is not a fight we can lose. This isn't about partisanship, or rhetoric, or politics. This is about saving lives. It's about working towards a thriving planet and a thriving economy. I hope you'll help us now as we lead the charge. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee

name: LAST CHANCE (via DSCC)
subject: the most important email we've sent all year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We've got less than two hours til the FEC deadline -- and we're still $3,708 short of our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal.
---

**_***ABSOLUTE LAST CHANCE! TRIPLE-MATCH ENDS AT MIDNIGHT***_
[Pitch in now for 4X the impact >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Time's running out, team!

We've got less than two hours til the FEC deadline -- and we're still $3,708 short of our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal.

We know the GOP is watching to see whether grassroots Democrats are going to be there for Senate Democrats in the tough fights ahead. This is a chance to send the GOP a big message!

And here's the kicker: **ALL GIFTS will be TRIPLE-MATCHED until midnight.** Your support will go FOUR TIMES as far -- but only if you act now!

[**We need you, team! Pitch in and get your gift TRIPLE-MATCHED before the deadline hits!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170930-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de0c/2b07114c/e86cd3dc/7315c6e4/3078322686/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de0c/2b07114c/e86cd3dc/7315c6e7/3078322686/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de0c/2b07114c/e86cd3dc/7315c6e6/3078322686/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
